channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: My Apple Watch’s daily charging habit put me off smartwatches — this Prime Day Garmin deal has pulled me back in
item.description: I'd given up on smartwatches, but an Amazon Prime Day deal has tempted me back into getting one again.

item.title: Figma adds code layers, support for animations, more AI features in new update
item.description: Figma's update adds a new code layer, support for motion and shaders, and the ability to create custom plugins for various tasks using AI.

item.title: Binance quitte la France au 1er juillet : ce qu’il faut faire de vos cryptos
item.description: Binance vient de confirmer par e-mail à ses utilisateurs français qu’elle n’aura pas son agrément européen à temps. Résultat : plus aucun service crypto en France à partir du 1er juillet 2026.

item.title: We know GTA 6's price now, so prepare for its launch with these Logitech and Razer headset and controller Prime Day deals
item.description: It's time to prepare for GTA 6's launch with these stellar PlayStation headset and controller Prime Day deals.

item.title: LastPass data breach confirmed: Everything we know so far
item.description: LastPass confirmed hackers stole customer contact info via a third-party vendor breach. Here's what was taken and what you should do now.

item.title: Ne quittez pas le Crédit Agricole : son application de paiement ne remplacera pas Apple Pay sur iPhone
item.description: Le Crédit Agricole a lancé sa propre application de paiement sans contact sur iPhone, mais la banque jure qu'elle ne tuera pas Apple Pay pour autant. Les clients gardent le choix.

item.title: How to watch Switzerland vs Canada: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time as FIFA World Cup 2026 co-hosts aim to seal last-32 place
item.description: Here's how to watch Switzerland vs Canada for free online and from anywhere as the two nations fight to finish top of Group B at the FIFA World Cup 2026.

item.title: Geekom's Prime Day mini PC deals just dropped — here's our verdict based on our benchmark tests
item.description: We benchmarked the best Geekom Amazon Prime Day deals to help you find the highest-performing mini PCs on sale today.

item.title: These Prime Day Gift Card Deals Are Basically Free Money (2026)
item.description: If you were planning on spending anyway, these deals are essentially free money for your favorite restaurants and stores.

item.title: Prime Day : Amazon baisse le prix de la console PC Asus ROG Xbox Ally de 25 %
item.description: La console PC portable ROG Xbox Ally, résultat d’une alliance entre Microsoft et Asus, n'est pas parfaite. Mais quand elle est en promotion, comme pendant le Prime Day d'Amazon, on la recommande plus facilement. Vous pouvez donc la trouver à 449 euros au lieu de 599,99 euros sur la plateforme américaine.

item.title: How to watch Tour de France 2026 free from anywhere with this VPN deal
item.description: How to watch Tour de France 2026 for free with a VPN. Tadej Pogacar will need to see off Jonas Vingegaard Paul Seixas for a record-equalling fifth title.

item.title: Les soldes d’été 2026 démarrent fort : voici les meilleurs deals à saisir en DIRECT
item.description: Les soldes d'été 2026 débutent sous un soleil ardent, certes, mais s'accompagnent d'une belle fonte des prix côté Tech. Smartphones, tablettes, TV ou encore PC portables, il y en a pour tous les budgets dans notre sélection en temps réel des meilleures offres.

item.title: Somehow this Payday 3 alternative is still getting massive free updates three years after release
item.description: Everyone has forgotten about Crime Boss: Rockay City, except its developers and, honestly, I'm glad.

item.title: Vulnerabilities uncovered in secret US government systems and software during testing of Anthropic Mythos
item.description: The US Government confirmed what the community already knows - Mythos is a true beast.

item.title: I watched Supergirl starring Milly Alcock and Jason Momoa — and the DC comic-book movie isn't the terrific Woman of Tomorrow adaptation I'd hoped for
item.description: Based on the Supergirl: Woman of Tomorrow comic book series, the Milly Alcock-led superhero movie is DC Studios' first major misfire.

item.title: Supergirl review: Better than the comic, but not DCs best
item.description: Milly Alcock and Jason Momoa bring big attitude to James Gunn's relaunched DC Universe. "Supergirl" review.

item.title: 29 phones to avoid buying this Prime Day for the exact same reason — and which models to consider instead
item.description: Several phones are set to lose software support soon — here are 29 models to avoid buying this Prime Day, and which to consider instead.

item.title: The best Prime Day deals on noise-cancelling and open earbuds: shop AirPods, Bose, and picks under $100
item.description: We've rounded up the best earbud deals you can grab from June 23 to 26 during Prime Day, including the AirPods Pro 3 for $179.

item.title: Looking for a sweet AirPods Prime Day deal? I've got every lowest-seen price live now — AirPods Pro 3 and AirPods Max 2 at best-ever prices!
item.description: AirPods are some of the most requested products on Prime Day, so here are the best prices live now, wherever you live.

item.title: LDLC répond à la Steam Machine avec sa « Stim Machine » : même prix de 1 039 €, mais un GPU plus puissant
item.description: LDLC lance la « Stim Machine », un PC Mini-ITX vendu 999,95 € en kit ou 1 039 € monté, soit le prix exact de la Steam Machine de base. Le clin d'œil à Valve est assumé.

item.title: Amazon fait mal aux soldes avec son Prime Day : voici les meilleures offres qui méritent votre argent
item.description: Le Prime Day d'Amazon est officiellement lancé depuis hier ! Jusqu'à vendredi, vous allez pouvoir découvrir une multitude de promotions, mais pour vous faire gagner du temps, nous faisons le tri en temps réel pour vous proposer uniquement les offres les plus intéressantes.

item.title: Why settle? The Kindle Colorsoft is so cheap for Prime Day that it no longer makes sense to choose the Kindle Paperwhite
item.description: Sure, I've fantasized about swapping my Kindle Paperwhite for a full-color Kindle Colorsoft, but why spend over $200 just to have some visual variety? But now, with the Colorsoft priced at near Paperwhite levels for Prime Day, it's a no-brainer.

item.title: Casques, écouteurs et enceintes Bluetooth sont à prix cassé cet été ! Voici les meilleures offres du Prime Day d’Amazon sur l’audio
item.description: Accessoires incontournables du quotidien, les casques audio et les écouteurs sans fil permettent de profiter d'un bon son dans la rue, les transports, les parcs ou en terrasse. Avec l'été qui commence à peine, il serait peut-être temps de s'équiper pour écouter dans les meilleures conditions les prochains hits de l'été.

item.title: Oubliez la Steam Machine, voici la Stim Machine
item.description: C'est français monsieur. La Steam Machine n'est pas encore sortie, que LDLC, entreprise française, veut lui couper l'herbe sous le pied en sortant sa Stim Machine, une console-PC clairement inspirée du cube de Valve, mais qui se veut plus puissante pour moins chère.

item.title: Pourquoi Wikipédia a banni définitivement son cofondateur Larry Sanger
item.description: Larry Sanger a co-fondé Wikipédia en 2001. Il en est parti en 2002. Depuis vingt-cinq ans, il ne cesse de la critiquer. L'encyclopédie vient de l'en remercier définitivement.

item.title: I spent £60 in the Prime Day sales but missed my chance for a £15 voucher, and now I'm fuming — don't make the same mistake I did
item.description: A no-strings-attached Amazon voucher? I'm kicking myself.

item.title: Amazon just dropped some rare Prime Day camping deals on Yeti and Coleman gear
item.description: Amazon Prime Day camping deals include Coleman coolers, tents, Anker Solix power stations, and more. As of June 24, Amazon added some rare discounts on Yeti coolers.

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs écrans portables pour PC, Mac, smartphones et Switch 2 en 2026 ?
item.description: Assez méconnus, les écrans portables (ou « moniteurs externes ») ont de plus en plus le vent en poupe. Il faut dire que les caractéristiques de leurs dalles se sont améliorées et que la connectique USB-C avec DisplayPort a ouvert des possibilités. Voici notre sélection des meilleurs écrans portables.

item.title: Intuit will show off how it rebuilt its AI infrastructure to support fast and complex tasks at VB Transform 2026
item.description: Customer expectations have shifted from simple, fast conversational interactions to complex agentic AI-powered tasks that legacy IT architectures simply can’t handle. To address this, Intuit made the bold decision to overhaul its technical infrastructure for its business platform. The company moved away from its multi-agent setup, which prioritized broad capabilities, to a granular, skill-and-tool-based architecture while embedding human experts directly into the workflow alongside AI. This shift involved decomposing its massive agents into specialized components, separating the brain from the...

item.title: Dutton Ranch season 2 renewed by Paramount+ ahead of 'explosive' season 1 finale — now the Yellowstone spinoff just needs Taylor Sheridan as showrunner
item.description: It's the least surprising news ever, but Dutton Ranch season 2 has officially been confirmed by Paramount+. But what does this mean for its showrunner?

item.title: Climate.gov staff relaunch site after Trump killed it
item.description: Former NOAA scientists have relaunched a hub for climate change information after President Trump axed Climate.gov last year.

item.title: J’ai testé le Google Home Speaker : l’enceinte connectée boostée à Gemini
item.description: Avec sa nouvelle enceinte Home Speaker, Google veut remettre l’enceinte connectée au centre de la maison. Plus conversationnelle, plus intégrée à l’écosystème domotique et toujours pensée pour piloter musique, objets connectés et services du quotidien à la voix, elle entend faire mieux que les anciens modèles sans changer de philosophie.

item.title: Sorry, America: The World Cup is free to watch in the UK
item.description: BBC iPlayer and ITVX are showing all 104 2026 FIFA World Cup games between them, which means all the action is free to stream live for UK TV Licence holders.

item.title: Amazon Prime Day is here: We found the 75+ best live deals on Apple, Sony, Kindle, and Lego favorites
item.description: Find the best Prime Day deals of 2026 on Sony headphones, Samsung TVs, Kindles, and Apple Watches.

item.title: I'm back into vinyl in a big way in 2026, and Fluance's top cheap turntable is 20% off for Prime Day in this turntable deal, but only for 12 hours (so hurry!)
item.description: The highly-rated Fluance RT81 turntable is enjoying a Lightning Deal as part of Amazon's Prime Day, saving you 20%. But the discount only lasts for 12 hours — quick!

item.title: Prime Day 2026: Get live updates on Amazon deals from Apple, Bose, Lego, and Sony
item.description: Get live updates on the first Prime Day of 2026. We found record-low prices on AirPods, DJI drones, Kindles, Sony headphones, and more.

item.title: Forget Prime Day right now — all of my favorite Dell laptops are even cheaper directly from Dell, including $499.99 for a Ryzen 7
item.description: Amazon Prime Day has some great deals — but Dell has it beat with these deals on some of my favorite laptops of the year.

item.title: Soldes 2026 : il y a -200 € sur un TV Mini-LED QLED 4K de 65″ et 165 Hz misant sur la fluidité et le contraste avec supplément gaming
item.description: Le Hisense 65U7S Pro est un téléviseur Mini-LED QLED de 65 pouces qui propose une image lumineuse, à retrouver pour 1 099 euros au lieu de 1 299 euros.

item.title: Boulanger fait le plein de bonnes affaires lors des soldes : les 10 offres à retenir
item.description: Top départ pour les soldes d'été chez Boulanger, et l'enseigne ne fait pas les choses à moitié ! Il brade immédiatement les produits Tech phares de 2026, incluant le Samsung Galaxy S26+ ou le téléviseur LG OLED C6. Pour vous faire gagner du temps, découvrez les véritables bons plans à saisir dès la première démarque.

item.title: Who is Darializa Avila Chevalier? The upstart NY democratic socialist who just beat a long-serving congressman
item.description: The 32-year-old political newcomer just pulled off one of the biggest primary upsets in recent memory. Here’s what to know. On Tuesday night, 32-year-old political newcomer Darializa Avila Chevalier defeated five-term democratic Congressman Adriano Espaillat, of New York’s 13th District, in New York’s primary election.

item.title: 1 € le litre et 1 500 km d’autonomie : le coup de maître de Renault avec ses nouvelles Clio, Captur et Symbioz
item.description: Renault dévoile une nouvelle génération de moteurs GPL pour ses Clio, Captur et Symbioz. Outre une puissance en hausse, ces versions voient leur consommation réduite pour une autonomie portée à 1 500 km. Très attractif pour payer moins cher à la pompe.

item.title: The best Prime Day streaming deals right now: 10+ subscriptions for less than $1
item.description: Are there any streaming deals for Prime Day? Yes, the best Prime Day streaming deals include Paramount+, HBO Max, Apple TV, and more.

item.title: America’s 250th birthday has many in the U.S. feeling conflicted about celebrating, Gallup poll shows
item.description: Most Americans feel the founding fathers wouldn’t be pleased with how the U.S. has turned out. Duane Mitchell has big plans for the United States’ 250th anniversary.Mitchell, a 78-year-old veteran in Montana, plans to take a red, white and blue 1954 Chevrolet pickup that he restored and drive it in local parades for the Fourth of July. In honor of the country’s milestone anniversary, he bought a decorative eagle to mount on the back of the truck, accompanied by American flags.“I’ll be driving my pickup,” he said, referring to his role in the parades. “Usually we freeze a whole bunch of candy, ...

item.title: GTA 6 devrait corriger le pire défaut technique de GTA 5
item.description: PlayStation affirme que GTA 6 n'aura quasiment aucun temps de chargement à sa sortie sur PS5. Une amélioration nette par rapport à GTA 5, l'un des plus mauvais élèves en la matière.

item.title: The Trump White House Is Over Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei
item.description: At high-stakes meetings with the White House, Anthropic's cofounder—a "weirdo," per one official—has been replaced by cofounder Tom Brown.

item.title: 21 Prime Day deals Verge readers are buying right now
item.description: There are an overwhelming number of Prime Day deals to sort through, which is why we spend so much time highlighting products we’ve already tested and can stand behind. But our recommendations are only one way to identify a worthwhile deal: another is seeing which products fellow Verge readers actually buy. Below, we’ve rounded up […]

item.title: GTA 6 fans say locking content behind the Ultimate Edition is 'scummy', but it looks like an upgrade will be available post-launch
item.description: GTA 6 Ultimate Edition has tons of exclusive content, but a PS Store listing appears to confirm a separate upgrade will be available at launch.

item.title: OpenAI unveils first custom AI inference chip, Jalapeño, with Broadcom — and its development was sped-up with OpenAI's own models
item.description: OpenAI and Broadcom this morning unveiled their first custom AI accelerator chip named "Jalapeño," positioning it is as a purpose-built processor for large language model (LLM) inference, rather than the more general GPUs offered by the likes of Nvidia or AMD. According to its creators, Jalapeño is designed to support workloads behind ChatGPT, Codex, the API and future agentic products, though notably, both OpenAI's and Broadcom's news releases position it as a product that could be made available to external AI firms as well — "built from the ground up for current and future LLMs across the i...

item.title: Stop saying John Ternus has to fix Apple — the company is fine, his job is simply to carry Cook's legacy forward and yes, to roll out more winning designs
item.description: New reports claim John Ternus wants to reinvigorate Apple design, but I think that's a misreading of the past, present, and near future of Apple

item.title: We found 10+ Prime Day deals on MicroSD and portable SSDs for a brief respite from RAMageddon
item.description: With RAMageddon, prices are going way up. But these Prime Day deals keep prices low on portable SSDs and microSDs from Samsung, SanDisk, and Lexar.

item.title: GTA VI price revealed: What you get for the $99 ultimate edition
item.description: 'Grand Theft Auto VI' finally has a price, but there's a more expensive Ultimate Edition that complicates things a bit.

item.title: I test e-readers, and Ive found the best-ever Kindle deals to shop on Prime Day
item.description: Prime Day Kindle deals have finally landed. The best savings are on the Kindle Paperwhite Signature Edition, but you can also save over $100 on the new Kindle Scribe.

item.title: Zoox upgrades its robotaxi as it prepares for commercial service
item.description: The new Zoox robotaxi has more cushioning, lighter colors, and a better microphone and speaker for communicating with Zoox Support.

item.title: I'm using the Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake as an excuse to deck out my gaming station with the best Nintendo Switch 2 Lego, accessories and merch — here are my top picks as a super-fan
item.description: The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time is my all-time favorite game — these are the Nintendo Switch 2 accessories and merchandise I'm shopping for until the game releases

item.title: Too many Kindle Prime Day deals to choose from? Take our quick quiz to find the right model for you
item.description: As usual, there's a mountain of Kindle deals to choose from this Prime Day — take our quiz to find the right model for you.

item.title: 8BitDo’s all-button controller gets a screen upgrade for customizations without an app
item.description: 8BitDo announced a new version of its all-button Arcade Controller that debuted a little over a year ago. The new Arcade Controller Pro looks similar to 8BitDo's original with a leverless (or Hitbox) design that replaces joysticks with buttons for improved precision and responsiveness. The new Pro version comes with upgrades that include an even […]...

item.title: Zoox’s purpose-built robotaxi is getting a refresh
item.description: Zoox, the autonomous vehicle company owned by Amazon, unveiled a new look for its boxy, bidirectional robotaxi, calling it the "next evolution" of the vehicle intended for mass production. The company is currently operating a free robotaxi service in San Francisco, Las Vegas, Austin, and Miami while it waits for the federal government to approve […]...

item.title: This new tracking label could help solve cargo theft
item.description: The Samsara Tracking Label hides a BLE system that can offer real-time location in a disposable package.

item.title: Don't drive in the lava! — Star Wars: Galactic Racer will feature status effects on each planet 'that can be inflicted on you', but can also be counteracted thanks to the synergy system
item.description: Fuse Games has revealed that Star Wars: Galactic Racer features a synergy system with status effects that impact the players' vehicles.

item.title: 'We hope to sign the agreement soon': White House calls on Meta to submit AI models for review, citing abilities and vulnerabilities evaluation
item.description: OpenAI, Google and others all submit their latest models for White House review – Meta urged to do the same.

item.title: 8BitDo launches the Arcade Controller Pro for hardcore fighting game fans
item.description: The 8BitDo Arcade Controller Pro is a subtle update for hardcore fighting game fans.

item.title: Children using AI in schools: How 3 major countries differ in policy amid debate on tech’s brain effects
item.description: Norway is cracking down with a generative AI ban, but other nations are encouraging AI use with labs and mandatory curricula. On June 19, Norway’s prime minister Jonas Gahr Støre announced a near ban on the use of generative AI by elementary school students.

item.title: Zoox just redesigned its robotaxis for more comfort and less stink
item.description: The new Zoox robotaxi design takes lessons from half a million rides. And from human nature. In the more than 2.5 million miles Zoox robotaxis have driven in San Francisco and Las Vegas since last September, the Amazon-owned driverless vehicle service has learned a lot about operating on chaotic city streets. The company has also learned a lot about the chaos people can bring inside their vehicles....

item.title: Fnac et Darty donnent tout pour le début des soldes : le TOP 14 des offres
item.description: C'est le top départ des soldes d'été ! Le duo incontournable Fnac et Darty ne perd pas de temps et lance une grande braderie. Smartphones, PC portables, TV 4K ou écouteurs sans fil : découvrez les véritables bons plans de cette première démarque.

item.title: When does Prime Day end? Heres how long the sale lasts in 2026.
item.description: When does Prime Day end in 2026? Here's exactly how long the Amazon sale lasts this year.

item.title: OpenAI unveils its first custom chip, built by Broadcom
item.description: Named Jalapeño, the new processor was designed specifically for the unique needs of OpenAI's inference systems.

item.title: Oura Ring 5 review: a luxury smart ring for discreet everyday wellness tracking that’s (almost) easy to forget you’re wearing
item.description: From its new tiny frame to the various health tracking data it can catalog, there's a lot of standout positives in my Oura Ring 5 review — but also some red flags.

item.title: Snag these Nintendo Switch deals during Prime Day 2026
item.description: As of June 24, shop the best Prime Day Nintendo Switch deals at Amazon.

item.title: I've Built Countless Sets, and These Are the Best Prime Day Lego Deals (2026)
item.description: I love building Lego sets, so here are my picks of the best Prime Day Lego deals. There are some great toy discounts, too.

item.title: Nos conseils pour construire sa Steam Machine : 8 composants, moins cher et un piège
item.description: Valve facture sa Steam Machine 1 039 €, et autorise désormais SteamOS sur les PC à carte AMD. On a monté la nôtre pour moins cher : voici les 8 composants à choisir, quel système installer, et le piège qui peut tout faire dérailler.

item.title: Google says it'll soon be easier to use TSA PreCheck Touchless ID via Wallet
item.description: Google Wallet will about to make TSA Precheck easier.

item.title: Norton 360 Advanced gets 77% discount, drops price to £2.92/mo — top-rated antivirus, 200GB cloud backup, VPN, parental controls and more
item.description: Antivirus, parental control app, VPN, password manager, dark web monitoring, scam protection, and cloud backup makes this perfect for household protection

item.title: Grâce au Prime Day, l’iPhone Air coûte enfin le prix que tout le monde voulait à la sortie
item.description: En perdant près de 450 euros, l'iPhone Air arrive à faire oublier ses défauts au profit de ses très nombreuses qualités. Des points forts portés par une prise en main appréciable et la présence de la puce A19 Pro.

item.title: OpenAI reveals its first AI processor: Jalapeño
item.description: OpenAI has just revealed a new "intelligence processor" chip for AI servers made in partnership with Broadcom. The chip, called Jalapeño, is designed to power current and future large language models, according to an announcement on Wednesday. Jalapeño is an ASIC (Application-Specific Integrated Circuit), meaning it's designed for a specific purpose: AI inference. With AI […]...

item.title: You don't need to skimp with a cheap action cam — DJI's discounted Action 4 is better quality — and much better value at its lowest-ever price
item.description: With punchy 4K video and 18m waterproofing, this is the best buy for adventurous vloggers on Prime Day.

item.title: Le Crédit Agricole lance une application pour remplacer Apple Pay : pourquoi c’est une fausse bonne idée
item.description: Le Crédit Agricole devient la première banque française à s'affranchir d'Apple Pay sur iPhone en lançant sa propre application de paiement sans contact. Une liberté permise par l'Europe, mais qui cache de lourdes contraintes.

item.title: This year’s Prime Day deals on Apple products are the best I’ve seen
item.description: Amazon’s Prime Day is now in its second day, and whether you’re looking for a new pair of wireless earbuds or a smartwatch, there’s a good chance you’ll find a discount. The Apple Watch Series 11 has already dropped to a new low price, while the AirPods Pro 3 are discounted to $179. With Tim […]

item.title: Laptop prices suck these days, but here are 25 Prime Day deals that help a little
item.description: The RAM, storage, and component crunch has come for new laptop prices. Plenty of models have gone up in price after being on the market for months, and so have those that’ve been on shelves for over a year. Plus, many new models are releasing at higher prices than the previous generation. So, it really […]

item.title: I track TV prices all year: Here are the Prime Day TV deals that are actually worth buying
item.description: Amazon has way more TVs on sale than its own Fire TVs. Prime Day runs June 23 to 26, I found deals on more than 25 TVs.

item.title: Why wearable AI must reduce cognitive overload
item.description: We're in a cognitive load crisis. Here's what wearable AI can actually solve.

item.title: The Oura Ring 4 is at an all-time low price for Prime Day — save over $200
item.description: As of June 24, the Oura Ring 4 (gold, size 6) has hit its lowest price yet at the retailer of $246.05. That's 51% off its full price of $499.

item.title: Une intense « boule de feu » a illuminé le ciel de Paris et du nord de la France : le phénomène enfin expliqué
item.description: En levant les yeux vers le ciel nocturne dans la nuit de lundi à mardi, peut-être avez-vous eu la chance d’apercevoir une brève mais intense traînée de lumière. Mais de quoi s’agissait-il ?
